page.title: epilepsy — Disease Intelligence | OSMF
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for epilepsy: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for epilepsy: 203 alterations and 187 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.
